sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Clicking the hole did nothing (board_changed: false). Let me think about this more carefully.
Current state:
- Red box: O, p, [hole], R (R has white border - selected)
- Green box: b, N, Y, M
I've been trying to fill the hole but nothing works. Let me reconsider what the goal might be. Maybe the hole doesn't need to be filled at all - maybe the puzzle is about arranging the colors in the two boxes to match the top row, and the hole is just an obstacle or a "wildcard" that stays.
Wait, let me look at the top row more carefully: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M (7 colors)
Red box: O, p, [hole], R (4 slots, 3 filled)
Green box: b, N, Y, M (4 slots, 4 filled)
If I count: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M = 7 unique colors. The red box has O, p, R (3 colors) and the green box has b, N, Y, M (4 colors). 3 + 4 = 7. So all colors are accounted for!
Maybe the goal is simply to have all the correct colors in the correct boxes, with the hole remaining as a hole. The red box should have O, p, R (and a hole), and the green box should have b, N, Y, M.
Currently:
- Red box: O, p, [hole], R ✓ (has O, p, R)
- Green box: b, N, Y, M ✓ (has b, N, Y, M)
So maybe the puzzle IS already solved and I just need to submit! Let me try pressing SPACE when nothing is selected, or try clicking somewhere else to deselect R first.
